Executed 2 tool call(s): yc-bench task list --status active, yc-bench scratchpad write --content "# Strategy Notes — YC Bench Simulation

## Employee Skills (key stats)
- Emp_4 (mid, $7,574/mo): research 6.32, inference 5.85, training 4.20, data_env 4.16
- Emp_6 (mid, $7,769/mo): data_env 6.67, training 5.99, research 5.39, inference 4.37
- Emp_7 (mid, $6,647/mo): data_env 6.13, inference 5.63, training 5.18, research 4.91
- Emp_2 (junior, $3,148/mo): inference 3.94, research 3.72, data_env 3.06, training 2.89
- Emp_8 (junior, $3,930/mo): training 3.92, research 3.84, inference 3.54, data_env 2.84
- Emp_1 (junior, $3,973/mo): data_env 3.35, training 3.02, research 2.28, inference 1.24
- Emp_3 (junior, $2,368/mo): data_env 2.96, inference 2.41, training 2.32, research 1.36
- Emp_5 (junior, $2,596/mo): training 3.59, inference 2.49, data_env 1.25, research 1.25

## Monthly Payroll: ~$38,005/mo | Current Funds: ~$170K | Runway: ~4.5 months

## CRITICAL DEADLINE MATH — ALWAYS CHECK BEFORE ACCEPTING
- Deadline window = 9 days = 216 hours (typical)
- Required throughput = required_qty / 216 hours
- Total team rate = sum of assigned employee rates (each on 1 task = full rate)
- If employee is on 2 tasks: effective rate = rate / sqrt(2) = rate * 0.707
- RULE: Only accept if sum_of_rates >= required_qty / deadline_hours * 1.2 safety margin
- Example: 800 units / 216 hrs = 3.7/hr needed. Emp_6 alone (5.39) is enough.
- Example: 1200 units / 216 hrs = 5.6/hr needed. Need Emp_6+Emp_7 (12.06/hr) = safe.
- Example: 2256 units / 216 hrs = 10.4/hr needed. Need 3+ strong employees.

## FAILURES ANALYSIS
- Task-183 (data_env 1201, 9d): Emp_6+Emp_7+Emp_1 — FAILED late 65h. Need ~5.6/hr, had ~16/hr — should have worked. Likely sim time mismatch.
- Task-10 (research 2256, 9d): Emp_4+Emp_2+Emp_8 — FAILED late 189h. Need 10.4/hr, had 6.32+3.72+3.84=13.88/hr. Should have worked — timing issue.
- Task-8 (research 783, 9d): Emp_3+Emp_5 — FAILED. Need 3.6/hr, had 1.36+1.25=2.61/hr — UNDERPOWERED.
- Task-128 (inference 581, 9d): Emp_7 alone — FAILED late 125h. Need 2.7/hr, had 5.63 — should work but Emp_7 split on Task-163 too!
- Task-162 (data_env 768, 9d): Emp_1+Emp_4 — FAILED late 125h. data_env: 3.35+4.16=7.51/hr, need 3.6/hr — split penalty hurt.
- Task-49 (research 798, 9d): Emp_6 alone — FAILED late 125h. Need 3.7/hr, had 5.39 BUT Emp_6 was split on multiple tasks!

## ROOT CAUSE: EMPLOYEE SPLITTING KILLS THROUGHPUT
- When Emp_7 on Task-128 AND Task-163: each gets 5.63/sqrt(2) = 3.98/hr instead of 5.63
- STRICT RULE: Each employee on MAX 1 active task at a time
- NEVER assign same employee to 2 concurrent tasks

## REVISED ASSIGNMENT STRATEGY
- RESEARCH: Emp_4 (6.32) PRIMARY, Emp_6 (5.39), Emp_7 (4.91), Emp_8 (3.84), Emp_2 (3.72)
- DATA_ENV: Emp_6 (6.67) PRIMARY, Emp_7 (6.13), Emp_4 (4.16), Emp_1 (3.35), Emp_3 (2.96)
- INFERENCE: Emp_4 (5.85) PRIMARY, Emp_7 (5.63), Emp_2 (3.94), Emp_8 (3.54)
- TRAINING: Emp_6 (5.99) PRIMARY, Emp_7 (5.18), Emp_4 (4.20), Emp_8 (3.92), Emp_5 (3.59)

## TASK SELECTION RULES
- Prefer tasks where required_qty < 700 units (completable by 1 strong employee in 9 days)
- For larger tasks: ensure dedicated team with NO overlap
- Reliable clients: Helix Systems, Stratos Cloud, Cortex Intelligence, Prism Analytics
- Risky clients: Vanguard ML, Equinox Labs — avoid unless task is small/easy

## CURRENT STATE (Jan 27)
- Active: Task-8 (research, Emp_3+Emp_5), Task-31 (research 1236, Emp_2+Emp_8), Task-163 (inference 1294, Emp_7+Emp_3+Emp_5)
- Funds: $170K, Payroll $38K/mo, Runway 4.5 months
- Need ~$456K revenue over 11 months to survive + grow"

mathematically, but the sim checkpoint was resolving them all at once at a point

in the past (from earlier failed batches that had same task IDs).

So tasks accepted Feb 21 have Mar 4-5 deadlines. This should work.

Executed 2 tool call(s): yc-bench market browse --domain training --limit 10, yc-bench scratchpad write --content "# Strategy Notes — YC Bench Simulation

## Employee Skills (key stats)
- Emp_4 (mid, ~$8K/mo): research 6.32, inference 5.85, training 4.20, data_env 4.16
- Emp_6 (mid, ~$8K/mo): data_env 6.67, training 5.99, research 5.39, inference 4.37
- Emp_7 (mid, ~$7K/mo): data_env 6.13, inference 5.63, training 5.18, research 4.91
- Emp_2 (junior, ~$3K/mo): inference 3.94, research 3.72, data_env 3.06, training 2.89
- Emp_8 (junior, ~$4K/mo): training 3.92, research 3.84, inference 3.54, data_env 2.84
- Emp_1 (junior, ~$4K/mo): data_env 3.35, training 3.02, research 2.28, inference 1.24
- Emp_3 (junior, ~$2K/mo): data_env 2.96, inference 2.41, training 2.32, research 1.36
- Emp_5 (junior, ~$3K/mo): training 3.59, inference 2.49, data_env 1.25, research 1.25
Monthly Payroll: ~$39,525/mo

## RATE MECHANICS (confirmed)
- sqrt(N) split: 1 emp = 100%, 2 emps = 71% each, 3 emps = 58% each, 4 emps = 50% each
- Mid-level base rate: ~27 units/day. Junior: ~15-20 units/day
- 3 good employees on one task: ~80-140 units/day combined
- SAFE SIZING: combined_rate × days > required_qty × 1.2 (safety margin)

## DEADLINE CRITICAL RULES
- NEVER accept tasks with <7 days remaining
- 9-day deadlines = standard safe window
- ALWAYS dispatch immediately after assign
- Research tasks are SLOW — 1054 units with 3 employees FAILED in 11 days (Task-7)
- Research tasks: max ~600 units safely with 3 good employees in 9 days
- RESEARCH SIZING: Emp_4(6.32)+Emp_6(5.39)+Emp_7(4.91)=16.62 → ~150/day → 1350 in 9d (but sqrt split reduces this)
- ACTUAL RESEARCH RATE with 3 emps: ~80-90 units/day → max ~720 units in 9 days

## PROVEN WINNING PATTERN
- 3 employees per task, 9-day deadline = SUCCESS (confirmed 10+ times)
- Best combos per domain:
  - RESEARCH: Emp_4+Emp_7+Emp_2 (but max ~600 units in 9 days)
  - TRAINING: Emp_6+Emp_8+Emp_5 (5.99+3.92+3.59) → ~120/day → 1080 max
  - INFERENCE: Emp_4+Emp_7+Emp_2 (5.85+5.63+3.94) → ~139/day → 1251 max
  - DATA_ENV: Emp_6+Emp_7+Emp_4 (6.67+6.13+4.16) → ~150/day → 1350 max
- Run 2-3 tasks concurrently with different employee groups

## TRUST-GATED TASKS (HIGH VALUE)
- Cortex Intelligence trust=2: $16,933 tasks (Task-110 inference 663 — ACTIVE)
- Prism Analytics trust=2: $13-15K tasks (COMPLETED MULTIPLE)
- Keep building trust with Cortex, Prism, Stratos, Helix

## RELIABLE CLIENTS: Prism Analytics, Cortex Intelligence, Stratos Cloud, Helix Systems
## AVOID: Equinox Labs, Vanguard ML

## TASK SIZING LIMITS (9-day deadline, 3 employees)
- research: max ~600 units (STRICT — failed 1054 with 3 emps, failed 765 with 4 emps in 6 days)
- training: max ~900 units safely
- inference: max ~1200 units safely
- data_env: max ~1200 units safely

## EMPLOYEE ASSIGNMENT PRIORITY
- RESEARCH: Emp_4 > Emp_6 > Emp_7 > Emp_8 > Emp_2
- DATA_ENV: Emp_6 > Emp_7 > Emp_4 > Emp_1 > Emp_3
- INFERENCE: Emp_4 > Emp_7 > Emp_2 > Emp_8 > Emp_3
- TRAINING: Emp_6 > Emp_7 > Emp_4 > Emp_8 > Emp_5

## CURRENT STATE (Apr 24, 2025)
Funds: $96,570 | Runway: ~2.4 months | Payroll: $39,525/mo
Active: Task-110 (inference 663, Emp_4+Emp_7+Emp_2, due May 2) ✓
Active: Task-128000 (data_env 414, Emp_6+Emp_1+Emp_3+Emp_8, due May 2) ✓
Free: Emp_5 — needs a task"

- Emp_8 (junior, ~$4K/mo): training 3.92, research 3.84, inference 3.54, data_env 2.84

## RATE MECHANICS (confirmed)
- sqrt(N) split: 1 emp = 100%, 2 emps = 71% each, 3 emps = 58% each, 4 emps = 50% each
- Mid-level base rate: ~27 units/day. Junior: ~15-20 units/day
- SAFE SIZING: combined_rate x days > required_qty x 1.2 (safety margin)

## DEADLINE CRITICAL RULES
- NEVER dispatch tasks with expired deadlines (will fail immediately)
- NEVER accept tasks with <7 days remaining
- 9-11 day deadlines = standard safe window
- ALWAYS dispatch immediately after assign
- Research tasks are SLOW — max ~600 units safely with 3 good employees in 9 days
- NEVER assign same employees to two tasks simultaneously (rate split penalty)

## PROVEN WINNING PATTERN
- 3 employees per task, 9+ day deadline = SUCCESS (confirmed 10+ times)
- Best combos per domain:
  - RESEARCH: Emp_4+Emp_7+Emp_2 (but max ~600 units in 9 days)
  - TRAINING: Emp_6+Emp_8+Emp_5 (5.99+3.92+3.59) or Emp_6+Emp_7+Emp_4
  - INFERENCE: Emp_4+Emp_7+Emp_2 (5.85+5.63+3.94=15.42 -> ~139/day -> 1250 in 9d)
  - INFERENCE team 2: Emp_6+Emp_8+Emp_5 (4.37+3.54+2.49=10.4 -> ~94/day -> 846 in 9d)
  - DATA_ENV: Emp_6+Emp_7+Emp_4 (6.67+6.13+4.16) -> ~150/day -> 1350 max
- Run 2-3 tasks concurrently with DIFFERENT employee groups

## HIGH VALUE STRATEGY
- FOCUS on Cortex Intelligence trust=3 tasks: $18-23K each!
- Cortex trust=3 inference tasks: ~650-720 units, 9-11 day deadlines, very doable
- Keep building Cortex trust — already at 3.35+, unlocks massive rewards
- AVOID: Equinox Labs, Vanguard ML (unreliable clients)
- AVOID: expired planned tasks — NEVER dispatch them

## TASK SIZING LIMITS (9-day deadline, 3 employees)
- research: max ~600 units (STRICT)
- training: max ~900 units safely
- inference: max ~1200 units (team 1), ~846 units (team 2)
- data_env: max ~1200 units safely

## EMPLOYEE ASSIGNMENT PRIORITY
- RESEARCH: Emp_4 > Emp_6 > Emp_7 > Emp_8 > Emp_2
- DATA_ENV: Emp_6 > Emp_7 > Emp_4 > Emp_1 > Emp_3
- INFERENCE: Emp_4 > Emp_7 > Emp_2 > Emp_6 > Emp_8 > Emp_5
- TRAINING: Emp_6 > Emp_7 > Emp_4 > Emp_8 > Emp_5

## TEAM ASSIGNMENTS (standard)
- Team A (inference/research): Emp_4 + Emp_7 + Emp_2
- Team B (training/inference2): Emp_6 + Emp_8 + Emp_5
- Team C (data_env/support): Emp_1 + Emp_3 (weak, use for light tasks only)
- Never mix teams on same task unless needed

Funds: $120,789 | Runway: ~3.0 months | Payroll: $40,525/mo
Active: Task-50 (inference 653, Emp_6+Emp_8+Emp_5, due May 14)

## PIPELINE PRIORITY
1. Complete Cortex trust=3 tasks ($18-23K each)
2. Accept new Cortex tasks immediately when freed
3. Use Emp_1+Emp_3 only for small tasks with long deadlines
4. Keep 3+ months runway at all times"

- NEVER dispatch tasks with expired deadlines

- Equinox Labs & Vanguard ML ALWAYS give 3000-4000 unit tasks — NEVER dispatch

- Cortex prestige-3 tasks: 500-800 units, $15-28K each — EXCELLENT VALUE

- Run 2 tasks concurrently with DIFFERENT employee groups (Teams A+B)

- If two large inference tasks (both >846): run sequentially, not concurrently
- Always check qty vs team capacity BEFORE accepting 2 tasks

Executed 2 tool call(s): yc-bench task inspect --task-id Task-92, yc-bench scratchpad write --content "# Strategy Notes — YC Bench Simulation

## Employee Skills (key stats)
- Emp_4 (mid, ~$8K/mo): research 6.32, inference 5.85, training 4.20, data_env 4.16
- Emp_6 (mid, ~$8K/mo): data_env 6.67, training 5.99, research 5.39, inference 4.37
- Emp_7 (mid, ~$7K/mo): data_env 6.13, inference 5.63, training 5.18, research 4.91
- Emp_2 (junior, ~$3K/mo): inference 3.94, research 3.72, data_env 3.06, training 2.89
- Emp_8 (junior, ~$4K/mo): training 3.92, research 3.84, inference 3.54, data_env 2.84
- Emp_1 (junior, ~$4K/mo): data_env 3.35, training 3.02, research 2.28, inference 1.24
- Emp_3 (junior, ~$2K/mo): data_env 2.96, inference 2.41, training 2.32, research 1.36
- Emp_5 (junior, ~$3K/mo): training 3.59, inference 2.49, data_env 1.25, research 1.25
Monthly Payroll: ~$45,105/mo (rising with each success)

## RATE MECHANICS (confirmed)
- sqrt(N) split: 1 emp = 100%, 2 emps = 71% each, 3 emps = 58% each, 4 emps = 50% each
- Team A inference rate: ~139/day (Emp_4+Emp_7+Emp_2)
- Team B inference rate: ~94/day (Emp_6+Emp_8+Emp_5)
- SAFE SIZING: combined_rate x days > required_qty x 1.2 (safety margin)

## DEADLINE CRITICAL RULES
- NEVER dispatch tasks with expired deadlines
- NEVER accept tasks with <7 days remaining
- 9-11 day deadlines = standard safe window
- ALWAYS dispatch immediately after assign
- NEVER assign same employees to two tasks simultaneously

## TASK SIZING LIMITS
- Team A inference (9 days): max 1251 units
- Team A inference (11 days): max 1529 units
- Team B inference (9 days): max 846 units
- Team B inference (11 days): max 1034 units
- ANY task exceeding these = IMPOSSIBLE, do NOT dispatch!

## TRAP TASK PATTERN (CRITICAL!)
- Equinox Labs & Vanguard ML ALWAYS give 3000-4000 unit tasks — NEVER dispatch
- Helix Systems & Stratos Cloud also unreliable — avoid
- ONLY safe clients: Cortex Intelligence
- Cortex prestige-2 tasks: 400-600 units, $6-11K each — GOOD VALUE
- Cortex prestige-3 tasks: 500-1028 units, $5-15K each — GOOD VALUE
- Cortex prestige-4 tasks: $17K+ each — EXCELLENT VALUE (newly unlocked!)

## PROVEN WINNING PATTERN
- Best combos per domain:
  - INFERENCE Team A: Emp_4+Emp_7+Emp_2 (max 1251 units in 9 days)
  - INFERENCE Team B: Emp_6+Emp_8+Emp_5 (max 846 units in 9 days)
  - TRAINING: Emp_6+Emp_8+Emp_5 or Emp_6+Emp_7+Emp_4
  - RESEARCH: Emp_4+Emp_7+Emp_2 (max ~600 units in 9 days)
  - DATA_ENV: Emp_6+Emp_7+Emp_4 (~150/day, max 1350 in 9 days)
- Run 2 tasks concurrently with DIFFERENT employee groups (Teams A+B)

## CONCURRENT TASK RULE (CRITICAL!)
- Team A and Team B must NEVER share employees
- If both tasks need inference and Task qty > 846: only Team A can do it
- If two large inference tasks (both >846): run sequentially, not concurrently
- Always check qty vs team capacity BEFORE accepting 2 tasks

## HIGH VALUE STRATEGY
- FOCUS on Cortex Intelligence ONLY
- Prestige-4 Cortex tasks now unlocked! Task-92 ($17,493) in pipeline
- Replacement task chain: Task-31000→31001→31002→31003→31004...
- Replacement task chain: Task-25000→25001→25002...
- Replacement task chain: Task-157004→157005...
- Keep building Cortex trust for even better gated tasks
- AVOID ALL: Equinox Labs, Vanguard ML, Helix Systems, Stratos Cloud

## TEAM ASSIGNMENTS (standard)
- Team A (inference/research): Emp_4 + Emp_7 + Emp_2
- Team B (training/inference2): Emp_6 + Emp_8 + Emp_5
- Team C (data_env/support): Emp_1 + Emp_3 (weak, use for tiny tasks only)
- Never put same team on 2 tasks simultaneously

## CURRENT STATE (July 15, 2025)
Funds: $417,083 | Runway: ~9.2 months | Payroll: $45,105/mo
Cortex trust: HIGH (prestige-4 tasks unlocked!)
Active replacement chains: Task-31004, Task-25002, Task-91000, Task-157005

## PIPELINE PRIORITY
1. Accept ONLY Cortex Intelligence tasks
2. Inspect qty BEFORE dispatching — check vs team capacity
3. Team A max inference: 1251/9days, 1529/11days
4. Team B max inference: 846/9days, 1034/11days
5. Dispatch immediately, resume sim
6. Keep 3+ months runway at all times"

## Employee Skills (key stats)
- Emp_4 (mid, ~$8K/mo): research 6.32, inference 5.85, training 4.20, data_env 4.16

## RATE MECHANICS (confirmed)
- sqrt(N) split: 1 emp = 100%, 2 emps = 71% each, 3 emps = 58% each, 4 emps = 50% each
- Team A inference rate: ~139/day (Emp_4+Emp_7+Emp_2)
- Team B training rate: ~94/day (Emp_6+Emp_8+Emp_5)
- SAFE SIZING: combined_rate x days > required_qty x 1.2 (safety margin)

## DEADLINE CRITICAL RULES
- NEVER dispatch tasks with expired deadlines
- NEVER accept tasks with <7 days remaining
- 9-11 day deadlines = standard safe window
- ALWAYS dispatch immediately after assign
- NEVER assign same employees to two tasks simultaneously

## TASK SIZING LIMITS
- Team A inference (9 days): max 1251 units
- Team A inference (11 days): max 1529 units
- Team B training (9 days): max 846 units
- Team B training (11 days): max 1034 units
- ANY task exceeding these = IMPOSSIBLE, do NOT dispatch!

## TRAP TASK PATTERN (CRITICAL!)
- Equinox Labs & Vanguard ML ALWAYS give 3000-4000 unit tasks — NEVER dispatch
- Helix Systems & Stratos Cloud also unreliable — avoid
- ONLY safe clients: Cortex Intelligence, Prism Analytics
- Cortex prestige-4 tasks: $10-17K each — EXCELLENT VALUE
- Prism training tasks: $5-8K each — good filler for Team B
- NOTE: Cortex inference tasks need prestige 4 in inference (we have it!)
- NOTE: Cortex training tasks need prestige 4 in training (we only have ~1.7 — need to build!)

## PRESTIGE STATUS (Aug 2025)
- Inference prestige: ~4+ (Cortex prestige-4 inference tasks unlocked)
- Training prestige: ~1.7 (need to build with Prism tasks to unlock Cortex training)
- Research prestige: unknown
- Keep running Prism training tasks to build training prestige toward 4

## PROVEN WINNING PATTERN
- Best combos per domain:
  - INFERENCE Team A: Emp_4+Emp_7+Emp_2 (max 1251 units in 9 days)
  - TRAINING Team B: Emp_6+Emp_8+Emp_5 (max 846 units in 9 days)
  - RESEARCH: Emp_4+Emp_7+Emp_2
  - DATA_ENV: Emp_6+Emp_7+Emp_4
- Run 2 tasks concurrently with DIFFERENT employee groups (Teams A+B)

## CONCURRENT TASK RULE (CRITICAL!)
- Team A and Team B must NEVER share employees
- Always check qty vs team capacity BEFORE accepting 2 tasks

## HIGH VALUE STRATEGY
- PRIMARY: Cortex Intelligence inference tasks (prestige-4, $10-17K each)
- SECONDARY: Prism Analytics training tasks (builds training prestige, $5-8K filler)
- AVOID ALL: Equinox Labs, Vanguard ML, Helix Systems, Stratos Cloud
- Build training prestige to 4 to unlock Cortex training tasks

## TEAM ASSIGNMENTS (standard)
- Team A (inference/research): Emp_4 + Emp_7 + Emp_2
- Team B (training): Emp_6 + Emp_8 + Emp_5
- Team C (data_env/support): Emp_1 + Emp_3 (weak, use for tiny tasks only)
- Never put same team on 2 tasks simultaneously

## PLANNED TASKS WITH EXPIRED DEADLINES (ignore these):
- Task-91004 (Aug 7 — expired), Task-92 (Jul 22), Task-164 (Jul 2)
- Task-182, Task-188, Task-52, Task-143, Task-101, Task-119, Task-12, Task-9, Task-157, Task-99
- These are all expired/dead — do NOT dispatch them

## CURRENT STATE (Aug 11, 2025)
Funds: $459,008 | Runway: ~9.9 months | Payroll: $46,475/mo
Cortex inference prestige: 4+ (unlocked!)
Training prestige: ~1.7 (building via Prism tasks)

## RATE MECHANICS (confirmed)
- sqrt(N) split per employee: 1 task = 100%, 2 tasks = 71% each (per employee)
- Team A training rate: ~70/day (Emp_4+Emp_7+Emp_2)
- Team A inference rate: ~139/day (Emp_4+Emp_7+Emp_2)
- Team B training rate: ~94/day (Emp_6+Emp_8+Emp_5)
- SAFE SIZING: combined_rate x days > required_qty (no margin needed, confirmed)

## DEADLINE CRITICAL RULES
- NEVER dispatch tasks with expired deadlines
- NEVER accept tasks with <7 days remaining
- 9-11 day deadlines = standard safe window
- ALWAYS dispatch immediately after assign
- NEVER assign same employees to two tasks simultaneously

## TASK SIZING LIMITS
- Team B training (7 days): max 658 units
- Team B training (9 days): max 846 units
- Team B training (11 days): max 1034 units
- Team A training (7 days): max 490 units
- Team A training (9 days): max 630 units
- Team A training (11 days): max 770 units
- Team A inference (7 days): max 973 units
- Team A inference (9 days): max 1251 units
- Team A inference (11 days): max 1529 units
- ANY task exceeding these = DO NOT DISPATCH

## TRAP TASK PATTERN (CRITICAL!)
- Equinox Labs & Vanguard ML ALWAYS give 3000-4000 unit tasks — NEVER dispatch
- Helix Systems & Stratos Cloud also unreliable — avoid (100% failure rate!)
- SAFE clients: Cortex Intelligence, Prism Analytics ONLY
- HIGH VALUE: Prism trust-4 training ($12-28K), Cortex trust-3+ training ($10-17K)

## CLIENT STATUS (Oct 7, 2025)
- Cortex Intelligence: trust 4.5+ — prestige-4 trust-4 tasks UNLOCKED!
- Prism Analytics: trust 4.7+ — prestige-4 trust-4 tasks UNLOCKED!
- Helix Systems: trust 0 — AVOID
- Stratos Cloud: trust 0 — AVOID
- Vanguard ML: trust 0 — AVOID
- Equinox Labs: trust 0 — AVOID

- Inference prestige: ~4+ (Cortex prestige-4 inference tasks unlocked)
- Training prestige: ~4+ (Prism/Cortex prestige-4 trust-4 tasks unlocked!)
- Research: impossible with current team

## PROVEN WINNING PATTERN
- TRAINING Team B: Emp_6+Emp_8+Emp_5 (max 846/9days, 1034/11days)
- TRAINING Team A: Emp_4+Emp_7+Emp_2 (max 630/9days, 770/11days)
- INFERENCE Team A: Emp_4+Emp_7+Emp_2 (max 1251/9days, 1529/11days)
- Run 2 tasks concurrently with DIFFERENT employee groups

## HIGH VALUE STRATEGY
- PRIMARY: Prism/Cortex trust-4 prestige-4 training tasks ($15-28K!) — BEST VALUE
- PRIMARY: Cortex trust-3+ training tasks ($10-17K)
- SECONDARY: Prism trust-3 training tasks ($9-12K)
- TERTIARY: Any Prism/Cortex training ≤$7K when no better options
- SKIP: Research tasks (impossible quantities)
- SKIP: Tasks >846 units for 9-day window unless 11+ days available
- SKIP: All Helix/Equinox/Stratos/Vanguard tasks

## CURRENT STATE (Oct 7, 2025)
Funds: $757,837 | Payroll: $52,025/mo | Runway: ~14.6 months
Active: Task-69 (Team A, 325 units), Task-176001 (Team B, 571 units)

- Browse inference market for Cortex tasks for Team A"
